title: Finding a Street
scene: 你在街上迷路了，向路人问路。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问百老汇大街怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to Broadway?

turns.cn: 往前直走两个路口，然后右转。
turns.en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn right.
How long does it take on foot?
About ten minutes.
Is there a subway station nearby?

turns.cn: 有，百老汇大街那头就有一个。
turns.en: Yes, there's one at the end of Broadway.
Thank you so much!

title: Left or Right
scene: 你在十字路口，不确定该往哪边走。

turns.cn: 不好意思，中央车站是在这边吗？
turns.en: Sorry, is Grand Central Station this way?

turns.cn: 不是，你得往回走，在第二个红绿灯左转。
turns.en: No, you need to go back and turn left at the second light.
The road on the left?

turns.cn: 对，一直走到底就能看到。
turns.en: Yes, keep going until you see it.
Is it far? I'm in a hurry.

turns.cn: 走路十五分钟，打车五分钟。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes walking, five by taxi.
Got it. Thanks a lot!

title: Inside a Building
scene: 你在一栋办公大楼里找会议室。

turns.en: Hi, where is conference room 1208?
Twelfth floor. Turn right out of the elevator.
Do I need to sign in as a visitor?

turns.cn: 请在这本子上写名字和公司。
turns.en: Please write your name and company in this book.
Which floor are the restrooms on?
On every floor, next to the elevators.
Thank you!

turns.cn: 请问苹果专卖店怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the Apple Store?
Third floor. Take the escalator up and turn left.
Where's the food court?
Fourth floor, right across from the escalator.
What time does the mall close?
Nine PM.
Okay, thanks!

title: Which Bus to Take
scene: 你在公交站，不确定该坐哪趟车。

turns.cn: 你好，去唐人街坐哪路车？
turns.en: Hi, which bus goes to Chinatown?
The M15, heading downtown.
Do I get on at this stop?
Yes. It comes about every five minutes.
Which stop should I get off at?

turns.cn: 运河街，我到了可以提醒你。
turns.en: Canal Street. I can let you know when we get there.
That would be great. Thank you!

title: Completely Lost
scene: 手机没电了，你完全不知道自己在哪。

turns.cn: 警官您好，我迷路了，能帮我吗？
turns.en: Officer, I'm lost. Could you help me?
Where are you trying to go? Do you have an address?

turns.cn: 我住万豪酒店，手机没电了。
turns.en: I'm staying at the Marriott. My phone died.

turns.cn: 酒店就在六个街区外，我指给您看。
turns.en: The hotel is six blocks from here. I'll point you the way.
Can I walk there?

turns.cn: 可以，沿这条街一直走，看到大钟楼就快到了。
turns.en: Yes. Go straight down this street until you see the big clock tower.
Thank you very much for your help!

title: Hospital Department
scene: 你第一次去医院，找放射科拍片。

turns.en: Excuse me, where is radiology?
Building B, second floor. Left out of the elevator.
Do I check in at the front desk first?

turns.cn: 对，一楼大厅，带保险卡和ID。
turns.en: Yes, main lobby. Bring insurance card and ID.
How do I get to building B?

turns.cn: 穿过这条走廊，过了咖啡店就是。
turns.en: Down this hall, past the coffee shop.
Thank you!

title: DMV Inside the Building
scene: 你在 DMV 大楼里找不到正确窗口。

turns.en: Which window is for license renewal?
Get a ticket first. Pick renewal and wait.
Where's the vision test?
Small room next to window seven.
Where do they take the photo?
To the right when you're done. No charge.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Parking Garage Exit
scene: 你在商场停车场找不到出口。

turns.cn: 不好意思，出口怎么走？我绕了两圈了。
turns.en: Sorry, how do I get to the exit? I've gone around twice.
Follow the green Exit signs toward P2 east.
Do I need to swipe a card?

turns.cn: 票在车里插一下，十五分钟内免费。
turns.en: Insert your ticket. Free if under fifteen minutes.
Thanks!
No problem. I got lost here too.

title: Ride-Share Pickup
scene: 机场你想找 Uber 上车区。

turns.en: Where do I catch Uber?
Terminal two, right outside, ground transportation.
Is it the rideshare zone?

turns.cn: 对，紫色标志，等司机说到了再走。
turns.en: Yes, purple signs. Wait until your driver says they've arrived.
How long to walk there?
About three minutes.
Thank you.

title: How Far to Walk
scene: 你问路人走到地铁站要多久。

turns.cn: 地铁站在步行距离内吗？
turns.en: Is the subway station within walking distance?

turns.cn: 走大概七八分钟，两个街区。
turns.en: About seven or eight minutes, two blocks.
Straight then right, right?
Yes, left at McDonald's.
Is there a covered walkway if it rains?
Not really. I'd bring an umbrella.
Thanks!

title: Where Is the Restroom
scene: 你在餐厅商场找洗手间。

turns.en: Excuse me, where's the restroom?

turns.cn: 走廊尽头左转，要钥匙吗？
turns.en: Down the hall and left. Do you need a key?
Do I need a key?

turns.cn: 不用，男女分开，标志清楚。
turns.en: No key. Men's and women's are marked clearly.
Is there a baby changing station?
Yes, in the women's room.
Thanks.

title: Airport Gate
scene: 你在机场转机，找登机口。

turns.en: Which gate is flight CA nine eight eight?
B thirty-two. Take the air train to concourse B.
Where's the air train?

turns.cn: 上楼跟着标志，五分钟一班。
turns.en: Upstairs, follow the signs. Runs every five minutes.
When does boarding start?

turns.cn: 起飞前四十分钟，屏上查。
turns.en: Forty minutes before departure. Check the screens.
Thank you.

title: Finding a Store in Plaza
scene: 你在露天商业广场找华人超市。

turns.en: How do I get to 99 Ranch Market?
Across the parking lot, by Target.
Is it far on foot?
Three minutes. There's a covered walkway.
What time does it close on Sunday?

turns.cn: 晚上九点，节假日可能早。
turns.en: Nine PM, maybe earlier on holidays.
Thanks a lot!
